message:
refactor(status): remove idle grace period and add user pane heuristic

Simplify the idle detection logic in UnifiedDetector by removing the
activity-based grace period that was causing unnecessary complexity
and occasional state flickering.

Previous behavior:
- Idle state was only reported if the agent appeared idle AND the last
  tmux activity was >= 1 second ago
- This caused agents to briefly show as "working" even when at prompt
  if there had been recent keystrokes or output

New behavior:
- Idle detection is now purely output-based via DetectIdleFromOutput
- If the output indicates an idle prompt, immediately report idle state
- Removes the temporal dependency that made status updates unreliable

Additionally added a heuristic for user/shell panes:
- Panes with empty AgentType or "user" type that have empty output or
  contain a shell prompt ($) are now treated as idle
- This prevents the dashboard from showing user panes as "working" when
  they're simply displaying an inactive shell

The changes apply to both single-pane (Detect) and bulk (DetectAll)
detection paths to maintain consistency.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
